completeness_boundary: The full cited PDF was reviewed and searched. not_reported means that no explicit statement was found in that source.

probes.question: Does AI-Researcher rank generated research directions using scientific-novelty and other criteria before comprehensively developing one concept?
Can Advisor Agent evaluation and review feedback affect whether an implementation advances and what investigation occurs next?
Does the implemented workflow execute computational experiments on data?
Does the source report a quantitative comparison of automated paper-review decisions with expert conference decisions?
Are explicit target-paper research instructions supplied to the agent in Level-2 tasks?
Does the present implementation use a dedicated external memory-management system?
Is the paper-review assessment based on only one LLM evaluation?
Do persistently unsuccessful prototype implementations advance to full-scale experiments?
Does the source report that AI-Researcher executes robotic, physical, or wet-lab experiments?
Does the source identify a human who approves or rejects each generated research direction inside the operational pipeline?
Does the source report a probabilistic confidence-calibration analysis for the paper-review agent?
Does the source report an independent external team reproducing AI-Researcher's generated experimental results?
